subcodes.first_line: O Father of the Exile! Hearken unto the call of the King of Kings from the right-hand side of this Prison which We have builded with Our hands [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا اب المهاجر اسمع ندآء مالک الملوک عن جهه الایمن عن هذا السجن الذی عمرناه بید
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @martyrs and martyrdom, @spiritual transformation
